title: Dazzling Glazed Syrian Fish Skewers
description: A funky and shattering Syrian dish featuring beurre-noisette and glaze, perfect for a weeknight dinner, this pescatarian-friendly recipe is sure to delight, with the combination of fish and spices creating a truly dazzling flavor experience.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the fish fillets onto skewers, if using wooden skewers, soak them in water for 30 minutes beforehand.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, paprika, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Add the fish skewers to the bowl and marinate for at least 15 minutes.
Remove the fish from the marinade and cook in the oven for 8 minutes.
Meanwhile, prepare the beurre noisette by melting the butter in a saucepan over medium heat until it turns golden brown.
Add the honey to the beurre noisette and whisk until well combined.
Brush the glaze over the fish during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Serve the fish skewers hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
